name: agentpowers
description: Search, purchase, and install AI skills from the AgentPowers marketplace. Browse categories, check security scores, manage your account, and install skills for any MCP-compatible platform — all from Claude.

tools.name: search_marketplace
tools.description: Search AgentPowers marketplace skills and agents

tools.name: get_skill_details
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a skill or agent

tools.name: login_account
tools.description: Log in to your AgentPowers account

tools.name: logout_account
tools.description: Log out from your AgentPowers account

tools.name: whoami_account
tools.description: Show current account identity

tools.name: get_account_profile
tools.description: Fetch authenticated account profile

tools.name: list_purchases
tools.description: List your purchases, licenses, and install commands

tools.name: start_checkout
tools.description: Create checkout session for a paid skill

tools.name: check_purchase_status
tools.description: Check purchase status and optionally wait for completion

tools.name: confirm_purchase_session
tools.description: Confirm purchase by Stripe session ID

tools.name: download_purchased_skill
tools.description: Get download URL for a purchased skill

tools.name: install_skill
tools.description: Install a skill with full automation

tools.name: install_purchased_skill
tools.description: Install a previously purchased skill

tools.name: check_installed
tools.description: List installed skills across platforms

tools.name: uninstall_skill
tools.description: Uninstall a skill from your system

tools.name: check_for_updates
tools.description: Check installed skills for newer versions

tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Search skills (alias for search_marketplace)

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: List marketplace categories and counts

tools.name: get_seller_profile
tools.description: Get seller public profile and published skills

tools.name: get_skill_reviews
tools.description: Get reviews for a skill

tools.name: get_security_results
tools.description: Get security scan results for a skill

tools.name: get_marketplace_snapshot
tools.description: Get API and account health snapshot

tools.name: get_platforms
tools.description: List all supported AI platforms

tools.name: get_openapi_summary
tools.description: Summarize the AgentPowers OpenAPI spec
